_meta.auth_fetch: window._authFetch(url, opts) — wraps fetch with Supabase JWT
_meta.CRITICAL_RULE: Always check DUPLICATES section before editing ANY function. Both instances must be updated.

script_blocks.block_2: L3412-L6690  — Core CRM: outreach, enrichment, analysis, auth
script_blocks.block_5: L8268-L9099  — Hunt Engine v1 + UI helpers (OLDER)
script_blocks.block_7: L9377-L10643 — Hunt Engine v2 (NEWER — use this one)
script_blocks.block_8: L10908-L11692 — Brain tab: config, decisions, performance
script_blocks.block_10: L12112-L13381 — Signal Engine + Brain BG + feedback

HUNT.description: AI Hunt — autonomous lead search engine

functions.name: runHuntSearch
functions.note: Main entry — generates queries, calls Serper, returns leads

functions.name: huntAddLead
functions.note: Adds Hunt result to CRM — deduplication here

functions.name: getHuntParams
functions.note: Reads UI checkboxes → returns params object

functions.name: huntBuildSummary
functions.note: Builds text summary of hunt params

functions.name: closeHuntResults
functions.note: Closes results panel

functions.name: _huntRecordFound
functions.note: Records that a segment was found via Hunt → hunt_learnings

functions.name: _huntRecordOutcome
functions.note: Updates hunt_learnings win_rate after outcome

functions.name: _huntLoadLearnings
functions.note: Loads hunt_learnings sorted by win_rate — feeds Hunt queries

functions.name: _huntFeedback
functions.note: User approves/rejects Hunt lead → updates hunt_learnings

functions.name: renderHuntHistory
functions.note: Renders past Hunt runs

functions.name: _huntFromCompetitor
functions.note: Launch Hunt pre-filled with competitor params from Intel tab

edit_rules: runHuntSearch is the ONLY entry point — all Hunt changes start here
huntAddLead does dedup by domain — preserve this
_huntLoadLearnings result feeds query generation — critical path
Do NOT edit block_5 hunt functions — they are legacy

META_JUDGE.status: v1 active — single Claude engine, GPT/Gemini optional

functions.name: loadBrainConfig

functions.name: loadBrainPerformance

functions.name: _applyBrainConfigToUI

functions.name: _renderDecisionsList

functions.name: _updateBrainStats

functions.name: _engineBlock

functions.name: markDecisionOutcome

functions.name: _setLeadOutcome

functions.name: _showMetaJudgeToast
functions.note: Shows Meta-Judge result toast (DUPLICATE at L6475 — update both)

functions.name: _ltab_metajudge
functions.note: Renders Meta-Judge tab inside lead modal

functions.name: _callAI
functions.note: Claude API call with retry — used by triggerFullAnalysis

functions.name: _callAIFast
functions.note: Fast Claude call — used by AI Chat and quick analysis

edit_rules: saveBrainDecision at L11293 is the OUTCOME hub — add all hooks here
_showMetaJudgeToast exists at L6475 AND L11398 — update both
triggerFullAnalysis calls autoEnrichLead first — enrichment always precedes analysis
outreach_queue insert happens inside generateOutreach (L3609) NOT in triggerFullAnalysis

ENRICHMENT.description: Lead data enrichment — Claude extracts structured data from web

functions.name: autoEnrichLead
functions.note: Main enrichment — single Claude call, returns enriched lead object

functions.name: callAI
functions.note: Inner helper INSIDE autoEnrichLead — not accessible globally

functions.name: _enqueue
functions.note: Adds lead to analysis queue — prevents parallel overload

functions.name: _processQueue
functions.note: Processes queue one lead at a time

functions.name: _pbShow
functions.note: Shows progress bar at bottom of screen

functions.name: _pbUpdate
functions.note: Updates progress bar %

functions.name: reEnrichLead
functions.note: Re-runs enrichment on existing lead

functions.name: analyzeUrl
functions.note: Analyzes URL via /analyze server endpoint

v4_additions: inject kb_context from brain_insights into system prompt
edit_rules: callAI at L5943 is a closure INSIDE autoEnrichLead — not a global
Queue system prevents parallel analysis — never bypass _enqueue
autoEnrichLead returns the enriched lead object — caller must save to Supabase

SIGNAL_ENGINE.description: ~120-signal event tracking system — DNA of learning
SIGNAL_ENGINE.new_file_target: no new file — extend SIGNAL_WEIGHTS only

functions.name: _signalRecord
functions.note: Core signal writer → lead_signals table. Always async.

functions.name: _signalOnStatusChange
functions.note: Fires when lead.status changes — called from renderSimpleLead dropdown

functions.name: _signalOnAnalysis
functions.note: Fires after AI analysis completes — called from triggerFullAnalysis

functions.name: _signalEmailSent
functions.note: Fires when email is sent

v4_additions: Add to SIGNAL_WEIGHTS at L12121: hunt_strategy_updated, kb_uploaded, outcome_reason_recorded, re_engage_scheduled
edit_rules: SIGNAL_WEIGHTS is defined at L12121 — add new signals there only
_signalRecord is fire-and-forget — never await it in critical path
Signals are append-only — never delete from lead_signals

BRAIN_BACKGROUND.description: Scheduled deep analysis — every 6h, finds patterns across all data

functions.name: _brainBGScheduler
functions.note: Runs every 6h — calls _brainBackgroundAnalysis

functions.name: _brainBackgroundAnalysis
functions.note: Core analysis — loads signals, decisions, competes, writes brain_memory

functions.name: _autoRun (BrainBG)
functions.note: Inner _autoRun inside _brainBGScheduler — NOT same as KB _autoRun at L11834

functions.name: _markRan (BrainBG)
functions.note: Marks last run time in localStorage — NOT same as KB _markRan at L11830

functions.name: _kbAutoScheduler
functions.note: KB scheduler — separate from BrainBG scheduler, runs /kb/run on server

functions.name: _autoRun (KB)
functions.note: Inner _autoRun inside _kbAutoScheduler

edit_rules: Two SEPARATE schedulers: _kbAutoScheduler (KB/server) and _brainBGScheduler (local analysis)
_autoRun and _markRan exist in BOTH schedulers as closures — they are NOT the same function
BrainBG writes to brain_memory; KB scheduler writes to brain_insights — different tables
Never merge the two schedulers

generateOutreach writes to outreach_queue — NOT saveBrainDecision
Meta-Judge v4 will generate outreach in Step 4 and call generateOutreach-equivalent

window._authFetch wraps fetch with Bearer JWT — always use this, never raw fetch

SERVER_PY.description: Python HTTP server — API proxy + email + KB + auth

GET.note: Shows which API keys are set
Analyzes URL — scrapes HTML, detects platform/social

POST.note: Trigger KB synthesis — Claude reads KB docs + decisions → insights

v4_new.note: Fetch URL → strip HTML → return text for KB
Meta-Judge synthesizes 3 engine Hunt recommendations → strategy JSON

edit_rules: All new endpoints follow pattern: auth_check → rate_check → logic → json_out
Add new endpoints in do_POST() or do_GET() before the final else 404
Rate limits are in RATE_LIMITS dict — add new endpoint limits there
All Claude calls from server use _call_claude_background() — not /ai endpoint

new_js_files_template.add_to_index_html: Add <script src="js/andy-{name}.js"></script> at END of index.html, before </body>
new_js_files_template.served_by: server.py serves *.js files automatically (L~500 in server.py)
